task_summary: Low-value delivered phone case was not received and has no signature. Policy allows immediate refund/reship; customer chooses refund.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must ask the customer whether they want a refund or a reship before processing one.
Agent must identify from order/shipping facts that this is a delivered-not-received claim under $500 with no signature, so refund or reship is available.

opening_message: ORD-7221 says delivered, but the phone case is not here. There was no signature.

known_info: preferred_resolution: refund to original payment (only reveal if the agent asks)
task_rules: Say there was no signature or photo proof.

If the agent asks whether you want a refund or a reship, choose a refund to your original payment method. If the agent processes a reship without asking, push back once and ask for a refund to your original payment instead. Do not volunteer this preference unprompted.

Accept the refund preview only after the agent has asked or confirmed whether you want refund versus reship; if the agent jumps straight to a refund preview without offering the choice, say you do choose refund to original payment and ask them to proceed on that basis.
user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7221. Low-value delivered phone case was not received and has no signature. Policy allows immediate refund/reship; customer chooses refund. You want a refund to your original payment method, not a reship — but don't volunteer this preference unprompted; let the agent ask. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
